# Taufik Nur Rahmanda, S.Kom

> Senior Software Engineer | Full-Stack Developer | Mobile & Web Specialist

## Professional Summary
Professional software engineer with over 8 years of experience in building high-quality web and mobile applications. Specializing in multi-platform development with a strong focus on clean architecture, performance optimization, and user experience. Proven track record of delivering 50+ projects across various industries.

## Technical Expertise
- **Languages**: TypeScript, JavaScript, Dart, PHP 8, Kotlin, Java, HTML, CSS
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, PHP, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Responsive Design
- **Backend**: Node.js, Express.js, CodeIgniter, MySQL/MariaDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, Sequelize, Drizzle, Neon
- **Mobile**: Flutter, Kotlin, Java, Android Studio, XCode
- **Tools & DevOps**: Git, Vite, npm, pnpm, Firebase, Vercel, GitHub Actions, Google Cloud
- **Others**: WordPress, SEO, UI/UX Design, Photoshop, Vegas Pro, Canva

## Featured Projects

### 1. Website Applications
- Built a high-performance, responsive enterprise-grade web solution using modern frameworks
- Optimized for performance, DRY principles, clean code, and full features functionality
- Implemented modern UI/UX principles for optimal user experience

### 2. Company Profile Websites
- Built a high-performance, responsive portfolio using vanilla JavaScript, HTML, and CSS
- Optimized for SEO and performance with perfect Lighthouse scores
- Implemented modern UI/UX principles for optimal user experience

### 3. Mobile Applications
- Developed and published multiple applications on Google Play Store and Apple App Store
- Specialized in Flutter for cross-platform mobile development with single codebase
- Focus on clean production-grade architecture and state management

## Professional Experience

### CEO & Founder
**TARRA Co (2024 - present)**
Indie software development studio specializing in mobile solutions. Architected and deployed 5+ Flutter applications with 100K+ combined downloads.

### Senior Software Engineer
**Nurosoft Consulting (2019 - 2026)**
Developed and maintained enterprise-level multi-platform applications for various clients.

### Full Stack Engineer
**J-Tech Solusindo (2016 - 2019)**
Developed and maintained web and mobile apps for various clients.

## Education

- **SMK Negeri 5 Malang (2008-2011)**: Software Engineering
